channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: 2 local TV giants merged. Then a court stepped in - NPR
item.description:
1. 2 local TV giants merged. Then a court stepped in  NPR
  2. Judge Eases Some Provisions Of His Order Blocking Nexstar-Tegna Merger, Extends TRO Another Week  Deadline
  3. Nexstar asks states, including Colorado, for $150M bond to cover damages from order slowing merger with Tegna  The Colorado Sun
  4. CORRECTION Nexstar Tegna Merger Lawsuit  Bluefield Daily Telegraph
  5. Nexstar Media Group Faces Delays in $6.2 Billion Tegna Acquisiti  GuruFocus

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Rises for 10th Day in a Row, Oil Slips Below $100 — Live Markets - WSJ
